pi_items.source: setup_task.sh spec instructions and verifier.py length check on valid_flats
setup_task.sh script generating 3 raw lights and verifier.py length check on calibrated_files
setup_task.sh spec configuration and verifier.py filter header check

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated 2D arrays mimicking astronomical darks and lights using NumPy normal distributions and synthetic star models. The metadata claims are fully verified: the pipeline specification explicitly demands 5 flat frames captured in the V-band and exactly 3 resulting calibrated float32 FITS files, with instructions saved to `/home/ga/Documents/pipeline_spec.txt`. The verifier confirms these counts and filter requirements, as well as applying mathematical array validation using an absolute tolerance of 1.0.
